title: Iran war 'very close to over,' Trump says — and the stock market 'is going to boom'
summary_full: The U.S. has beaten Iran "militarily" and that the war is "very close to over," Trump said, claiming a peace deal likely.
summary_public: The U.S. has beaten Iran "militarily" and that the war is "very close to over," Trump said, claiming a peace deal likely.

IR.label: positive
